case_title: OLIVIA JIAYI WU VS. BARBARA GARAITA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-08-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS OLIVIA JIAYI WU & LIZHU MAI, AND DEFENDANT BARBARA GARAITA. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU ASSISTED BOTH PLAINTIFFS AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT BARBARA GARAITA WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFFS' AMENDED CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WU, OLIVIA JIAYI AS TO DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WU, OLIVIA JIAYI IS NO LONGER PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-28-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, OLIVIA JIAYI
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, OLIVIA JIAYI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, OLIVIA JIAYI AS TO DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION CORRECTING DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, OLIVIA JIAYI MAI, LIZHU AS TO DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA

ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPORVED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-01-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, OLIVIA JIAYI MAI, LIZHU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARAITA, BARBARA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
